hero.description: Full scheduling management, multi-professional teams, automatic notifications and much more. The ideal solution to grow your business.

item1.text: "I cut no-shows by almost 80% with automatic reminders. My clients love confirming via WhatsApp. Calenvo completely transformed my salon."

item2.text: "I manage 6 physical therapists on a single screen. The reports show the most profitable time slots and which professionals are in higher demand. Simply indispensable."

item3.text: "The loyalty program was a game changer. Clients who used to come monthly now return every week. Repeat visits grew 40% in just 3 months."

features.title:
Everything you need,
in one system
features.subtitle: From scheduling to loyalty programs, Calenvo takes care of everything so you can focus on what matters.

card1.title: Online booking 24/7
card1.description: Your clients book whenever they want from their phone, no calls needed. Custom link, service menu and automatic confirmation.

card2.title: Automatic notifications
card2.description: Cut no-shows by up to 70%. Send automatic reminders via WhatsApp, SMS and email. Clients confirm or reschedule with one tap, no calls needed.

card3.title: Loyalty and points program
card3.description: Retain clients with a customizable points program. They earn points on every visit and redeem rewards — coming back more often and spending more.

item1.question: How does online booking work?
item1.answer: Your clients access a personalized public page and can book available slots in real time, directly on your calendar. No middlemen.

item2.question: Can I use it with multiple professionals?
item2.answer: Yes! Calenvo was built to manage multiple schedules and professionals on a single platform with full synchronization.

item3.question: How does the loyalty program work?
item3.answer: Set up packages, coupons and automatic bonuses that your clients accumulate with every purchase. Fully integrated with scheduling.

item4.question: Are WhatsApp messages sent automatically?
item4.answer: Yes. Confirmations, reminders and updates are sent automatically via WhatsApp to reduce no-shows and improve the experience.

item5.question: What are the support response times?
item5.answer: We offer email support. Paid plans get priority. Our community also helps with best practices.

ctaFooter.title: Ready to grow?
ctaFooter.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses that already transformed their scheduling with Calenvo

footer.description: The complete scheduling and loyalty platform for every industry
